key_evidence: State Street eliminated 900 jobs in Q2 2025 with AI-savings rationale; further 20-30% workforce cuts projected in Global Delivery for 2026.
Glassdoor employee reviews document persistent 'layoff mill' culture, offshoring pattern over past 10 years, and constant-threat environment.
2025-26 policy revision removed explicit TCFD/SASB endorsement language under political pressure, replaced with generalized 'disclosure and fiduciary duty' framing.
2024 $7.5M Connecticut AG settlement over inflated fees.
Sustainability Stewardship Service launched — genuine SYS/ACT positive; supports SYS score of 68.8.
Published uniform 4.5 across all 8 dimensions suggests reputational rather than dimension-specific scoring.
human_review_rationale: Two-band downgrade (exemplary->functional) from F500 rank #1 is highly consequential — recommend human review before applying even with high confidence. The 32-point delta + flagship-rank status warrants explicit reviewer sign-off.
